summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of OpenClaw Mission Control - PlusMenu Connectors rebuild and Space Assignment features. All 17 requested features tested and verified working.
passed_tests: PlusMenu Connectors: Opens submenu with 'Services' section showing 12 service connectors with toggles
PlusMenu Connectors: Shows 'Desktop Apps' section with 4 groups (Adobe, Microsoft, Google, Other Apps)
PlusMenu Connectors: Clicking Adobe expands to show 8 individual app toggles (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, Premiere Pro, After Effects, XD, Lightroom, Acrobat)
PlusMenu Connectors: Clicking Microsoft expands to show 7 apps (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, Teams, OneNote, VS Code)
PlusMenu Connectors: Clicking Google expands to show 7 apps (Docs, Sheets, Slides, Drive, Calendar, Chrome, Meet)
PlusMenu Connectors: Clicking Other Apps expands to show 5 apps (Spotify, Discord, Zoom, Terminal, Finder)
PlusMenu Connectors: 'Add app' button navigates to /customize?tab=connectors
PlusMenu Connectors: 'Manage connectors' link navigates to /settings?tab=apps
PlusMenu Connectors: Desktop app toggles work (toggle on/off individual apps like Photoshop)
PlusMenu Connectors: Group shows active count badge when apps are toggled on (e.g., '1' badge on Adobe)
Space Assignment: PlusMenu 'Add to Spaces' shows available spaces (Files, Design, Development) with colored icons
Space Assignment: Clicking a space assigns the current thread to it
Space Assignment: After assigning, thread shows space icon (colored) in sidebar Recents
Space Assignment: After assigning, thread shows colored space name badge in sidebar under thread title
Space Assignment: After assigning, InputBar shows a colored space chip (data-testid='space-indicator-chip')
Space Assignment: Space chip disappears when switching to a thread without a space (New thread button)
Space Assignment: Creating a new space via PlusMenu auto-assigns a unique color from SPACE_AUTO_COLORS palette
PlusMenu Spaces: Shows checkmark next to currently assigned space
Page Navigation: All 10 pages render correctly (Chat, Dashboard, Jobs, Approvals, Spaces, Settings, Cowork, Customize, Agent, Code)
Model Selector: Shows 'Select model' for new thread, opens with 6 providers (huggingface, ollama, opencode, opencode-go, openrouter, venice)
seed_data_creation: None - using mock data from Zustand store
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) PlusMenu Connectors submenu rebuilt with Services (12 connectors) + Desktop Apps (4 groups: Adobe/Microsoft/Google/Other with expandable individual app toggles). 2) Space Assignment fully functional - threads can be assigned to spaces, sidebar shows colored space icon and badge, InputBar shows space chip, chip disappears for threads without spaces. 3) New spaces auto-generate unique colors. Key data-testids: plus-menu-trigger, desktop-group-adobe, desktop-group-microsoft, desktop-group-google, desktop-group-other, add-app-btn, space-assign-space-files, space-assign-space-design, space-assign-space-dev, space-indicator-chip, new-space-input, create-space-btn, model-selector-trigger, new-thread-btn, chat-input, send-btn.
mocked_apis_note: ALL APIs are MOCKED via Zustand store - no real backend calls. Mocked: sendMessage, switchModel, toggleConnector, assignThreadToSpace, addSpace, all state updates
